player_options.description: Character creation: 3-4 distinct options for ONE field of the player's character, conditioned on everything already chosen
player_options.prompt_template:
You are helping a player create THEIR OWN character for a fantasy monster-catching adventure. Somewhere in the deep places sleeps a power that grants any wish - this character is going down after it. The player picks one of your options OR writes their own; your job is to spark ideas, not decide.

========== CONTEXT ==========

--- The character so far ---
{choices_so_far}

--- What is being decided now ---
{field_guidance}

========== YOUR TASK ==========
Offer exactly {option_count} options. Each option must:
- be {option_shape}
- fit everything already chosen about the character
- pull in a DIFFERENT direction from the other options (different moods, not variations of one idea)

========== RESPONSE FORMAT ==========
Respond with ONLY valid JSON in exactly this format:
{{"options": ["...", "...", "..."]}}

JSON:

player_blueprint.description: Character creation stage 1: snap the player's chosen kind onto the curated taxonomy and settle the factual skeleton

player_persona.description: Character creation stage 2: expand the player's chosen personality, wish, and background into the full persona - their words are law
player_persona.prompt_template:
You are fleshing out the persona of a PLAYER-CREATED character in a fantasy monster-catching game. The player already decided who this character is; you EXPAND their answers into game-usable detail. Their words are law - never contradict them, never soften their wish.

========== CONTEXT ==========

--- The character, as the player created them ---
{choices_so_far}

--- Their factual skeleton ---
{blueprint_facts}

========== YOUR TASK ==========
Expand into the persona below. Keep entries SHORT (1-3 words per list item, one tight sentence per prose field). Stay inside what the player established; invent only what follows naturally from it.
- personality_traits: 3 adjectives distilled from the player's personality answer
- motivations: why they chase their wish, in one sentence
- goals: ONE concrete ambition on the way to the wish
- beliefs: their worldview or code
- moral_character: how they treat others, plainly stated
- fears: ONE thing that truly frightens them
- likes / dislikes: 2 each
- hobbies: 1-2 things they do for their own enjoyment
- profession: what they consider their calling (from their background)
- attitude_toward_strangers: their default stance with strangers
- responds_well_to / responds_poorly_to: 2 each
- drawn_to / clashes_with: the personalities they bond with / grate against
- speech_style: HOW they talk - rhythm, vocabulary, verbal tics. Distinctive enough to write dialogue from.
- battle_line: their signature line when danger starts, true to that speech style

========== RESPONSE FORMAT ==========
Respond with ONLY valid JSON in exactly this format:
{{"personality_traits": ["..."], "motivations": "...", "goals": ["..."], "beliefs": "...", "moral_character": "...", "fears": ["..."], "likes": ["..."], "dislikes": ["..."], "hobbies": ["..."], "profession": "...", "attitude_toward_strangers": "...", "responds_well_to": ["..."], "responds_poorly_to": ["..."], "drawn_to": "...", "clashes_with": "...", "speech_style": "...", "battle_line": "..."}}

JSON:

player_story.description: Character creation stage 3: the finished prose - description, backstory, and the color/feature lists pulled from the player's own appearance text
player_story.prompt_template:
You are writing the finished prose for a PLAYER-CREATED character in a fantasy monster-catching game. Everything is already decided - your job is to write it well, staying absolutely true to the player's own words.

========== CONTEXT ==========

--- The character, as the player created them ---
{choices_so_far}

--- Their factual skeleton ---
{blueprint_facts}

--- Their appearance, in the player's own words (LAW - do not change it) ---
{appearance_text}

========== YOUR TASK ==========
Write:
- description: 2-3 sentences that capture this character at a glance - who they are and what they carry with them (in the third person, by name)
- backstory: one short paragraph (3-5 sentences) grown from their background and wish - where they come from, what they left, why the dungeon
- primary_colors: 2-3 colors pulled from their appearance text (invent sensible ones only if the text names none)
- distinguishing_features: 2-4 short visual features pulled from their appearance text

========== RESPONSE FORMAT ==========
Respond with ONLY valid JSON in exactly this format:
{{"description": "...", "backstory": "...", "primary_colors": ["..."], "distinguishing_features": ["..."]}}

JSON:
